Serious aria-prohibited-attr WCAG 2.0 axe 1 page, 1 instance

Ensure ARIA attributes are not prohibited for an element's role Learn more ↗

1 affected page — expand to see details

https://www.medicaid.gov/eligibility (1 instance)

#map-svg-map-1749492555669
<div id="map-svg-map-1749492555669" class="map-container" aria-disabled="true" aria-label="State Map Image. Keyboard navigating users can use dropdown to select state." style="position: relative; width: 800px; height: 457.143px; overflow: hidden; left: 0px; top: 0px;">

Fix: Fix all of the following: aria-label attribute cannot be used on a div with no valid role attribute.
